name: Incorrect Provider Directory Cost-Sharing Limit

eligibility.description: Applies when a participant receives services from a nonparticipating provider after being informed by the plan's directory or response protocol that the provider was in-network.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Limits cost-sharing to in-network levels if a taxpayer relies on inaccurate provider directory information that incorrectly listed a provider as participating.
